description: Letter copy from Sherira Gaon to the Maghrib, ca. 970. The writer describes the importance of the Yeshiva (Pumbedita) and asks to renew the communities’ support for the Yeshiva. The letter was written soon after Sherira became the Gaon. (Gil, Kingdom, vol. 2, Doc. #23) VMR
description_he: העתק מכתב משרירא גאון למגרב, כ-970, על חשיבות הישיבה בפומבדיתא ובקשה לחדש תמיכה הקהילות
